_meta.description: Pinned regression fixture — complex01 seed=42 n=500. Re-pinned 2026-04-26 for Option C: ff.harness.run now ranks trials by IC-realistic adjusted P&L proxy (total_pnl + n_trades * per_trade_overlay_charge_pips) instead of the legacy composite Quality metric, when artifacts/cost_table.json covers the pair. EUR_USD's USD-major liquid-session mean (~0.1 pips) gives a charge near -1.2 pips/trade; the new pick maximises trades*(expectancy+charge) and selects an EMA-cross trend-follower (136 trades, +1248 pips, PF 1.545) instead of the prior outlier-Quality 33-trade trial (337 pips, PF 5.029). Plan: C:\Users\ROG\.claude\plans\crystalline-enchanting-pebble.md. Previous values (before Option C): trades=33, win=18.18, pips=337, expectancy=10.21, max_dd=17.82, pf=5.029.
